title: Snap-on: High-Quality Stock And Products Deserve A Hold For Life
text: Consistent revenue, net income, free cash flow, and dividend growth. Consistent share repurchases that generously outweigh any stock-based compensation.

title: Snap-on Is A Good Buy At The Current Levels
text: The company's revenue should benefit from the initiatives in the Tools Group and positive long-term trends in the auto repair market. The margins should benefit from pricing actions, moderation in raw materials costs, and RCI initiatives.

title: My Dividend Growth Portfolio November Update - Healthcare Services Group Gets The Boot
text: Estimated income for 2022 is up to a record $15,545, while the portfolio continues to crush the S&P 500. Buying was light as the market is up big from the October lows. I am skeptical of the market and expect better prices in the future.
